DELETE:
DELETE FROM ZLBTKIBETSU_CAL
                     WHERE KAMOKU_CD       = c_NKAMOKU_CD               -- 科目コード(新規分)
                       AND KOKU_SETAI_NO   = i_NSETAI                   -- 国保世帯番号

DELETE FROM ZLBTKIBETSU_CAL
               WHERE KAMOKU_CD       = c_NKAMOKU_CD               -- 科目コード(新規分)
                 AND KOKU_SETAI_NO   = i_NSETAI                   -- 国保世帯番号
